---
title: "**Research**"
editor: visual
---



## **Working in Progress**

- How does public goods affect income inequality? Evidence from Belgium, with [*M. Castanheira*](https://sites.google.com/site/micaelcastanheiraswebsite/)

- Housing inequality in the US with [*G. Doemench-Arumi*](https://sites.google.com/site/domenechweb/home)
